title: Implement dependencies in Rust
description: Implement dependencies.rs matching Python logic. Use petgraph or custom graph impl.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Rust dependencies: new dependencies.rs with add/remove/list-ready and cycle detection; wired CLI subcommands tsk dep add/remove and tsk ready. Added rust/tests/dependencies.rs; cargo fmt and cargo test --test dependencies pass.
